changeSet.author: ahri-rbac
changeSet.comment: Seed AHRI SRS roles without changing department isolation or existing mappings.
changeSet.sql: WITH role_seed(name, description, group_name, display_key) AS ( VALUES ('Administrative Staff', 'Global user account and administrative reporting staff.', 'Global Roles', 'role.administrativeStaff'), ('IT Support Staff', 'Global IT support and diagnostics staff.', 'Global Roles', 'role.itSupportStaff'), ('EQA Personnel', 'External quality assurance personnel.', 'Global Roles', 'role.eqaPersonnel'), ('External Stakeholders', 'Read-only external report and dashboard viewers.', 'Global Roles', 'role.externalStakeholders'), ('Sample Collector', 'Department sample registration and intake staff.', 'Lab Unit Roles', 'role.sampleCollector'), ('Laboratory Technician', 'Department sample processing and result entry staff.', 'Lab Unit Roles', 'role.laboratoryTechnician'), ('Junior Researcher', 'Department researcher with sample update and review access.', 'Lab Unit Roles', 'role.juniorResearcher'), ('Senior Researcher', 'Department researcher with sample update and review access.', 'Lab Unit Roles', 'role.seniorResearcher'), ('Lab Manager', 'Department supervisor with validation, QA, and reporting access.', 'Lab Unit Roles', 'role.labManager'), ('Biomedical Staff', 'Department equipment management staff.', 'Lab Unit Roles', 'role.biomedicalStaff'), ('Principal Investigator', 'Project principal investigator.', 'Project Roles', 'role.principalInvestigator'), ('Project Coordinator', 'Project workflow coordinator.', 'Project Roles', 'role.projectCoordinator'), ('Data Manager', 'Project data analysis and reporting staff.', 'Project Roles', 'role.dataManager') ) INSERT INTO clinlims.system_role (id, name, description, is_grouping_role, grouping_parent, display_key, active, editable) SELECT nextval('clinlims.system_role_seq'), seed.name, seed.description, FALSE, parent.id, seed.display_key, TRUE, TRUE FROM role_seed seed JOIN clinlims.system_role parent ON parent.name = seed.group_name WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.system_role existing WHERE existing.name = seed.name );
